ref: The crowd joined in the attack on Paul and Silas. Then the officials tore the clothes off the two men and ordered them to be beaten with a whip.
text: Ban…Ф…Ыza tapl…Ыn…Ф al…Ы n…Ы kititiћА l…Фl…Ф …Ыl…Ы n…Ы Paulo n…ЫћА sila shu, k…Ыl…Ы bebhukulu…Ф ak…Ф …Фsha …Фs…Ы bebuћБ b…Фd…ФћГ kp…Ыkp…Ы n…Ы bal…Ыishu t…Ы behuisi al…Ы.
translated: The people are saying that in every market place that belongs to Paulo, with their hands, they carry big goods and also small loads quickly with their strength in order to sell them.

ref: We sailed from Tyre to Ptolemais, where we greeted the followers and stayed with them for a day.
text: B…ФzaћГ b…Фl…Ф keliћГabha kidzogagaћГ nabha oden…Ф Tiro p…Ы budiyiћА n…Ы Ptolemai, n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы b…Фs…Ыn…Ф badzyaa k…Ыl…Ы b…ФzaћГ bal…Ы …Фbha kiwui tinikpo.
translated: The people say that their chief was killed in the city of Tiro and in Ptolemai, and they witnessed the incident that the perpetrators are the people, the truth is clear before all.

ref: Simon Peter has told how God first came to the Gentiles and made some of them his own people.
text: Simon g…Ыenu Petro…Ф ash…Фr…Ф b…Фl…Ф kana g…Ы put…Фn…Ф Owusoso Akaa akas…Ы y…Ы tili t…Ыl…Фl…Фk…Ф n…Ы kibu…Ф g…Ы ebu ban…Ф eden…Ф bag…Ы etinu Yudan…Ы m…Ы ak…Ф y…Ыishu.

ref: Everyone who heard Saul was amazed and said, вАЬIsn't this the man who caused so much trouble for those people in Jerusalem who worship in the name of Jesus? Didn't he come here to arrest them and take them to the chief priests?вАЭ
text: K…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы banun…Ф g…Ы bazataat…ФћГ eluћГ y…Ыebui…Ы petee n…Ыibi k…Ыl…Ы bebisi as…Ы, вАЬG…Ыn…Ы any…Ы al…Ы y…Ыaza at…Ф…Ц…Ф k…Ыtakpu m…ЫћА ziziћГ n…Ы banun…Ф g…Ы beze kulu Yesu kinye …Ыl…Ы dza? translated: Brother K…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы, as the people are declaring these matters for listening while they stand/worship together here, they ask: вАЬWhat is it that we hold in our hearts, so that the people may know the great Jesus and His word? Or why do we say that the people, along with the chief, are hearing, so that the praying assembly fills our mouths together to speak truthfully in prayer?вАЭ

ref: вАЬWe found the jail locked tight and the guards standing at the doors. But when we opened the doors and went in, we didn't find anyone there.вАЭ
text: вАЬB…Фd…Ыm…Ф …Фs…Ы buduluћГ…Ф pete daћГa piapii, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы epo k…Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы eli kititiћА n…Ы buduluћГ…Ф, p…Ф g…Ыb…Ф dal…ЫћГ buvu…ФћГ, bag…Ыm…Ф ananaћА n…Ы b…Фl…Ы m…ЫћА.вАЭ
translated: People say the forest is extremely dry, there is no water, not even the small leaves in the forest remain, so the animals are perishing from hunger, and the birds are flying away.

ref: And when they heard this noise, a crowd gathered. But they were surprised, because they were hearing everything in their own languages.
text: G…Ы beluћГ oziћГ …Фl…Ы…Ы, ban…Ф…Ыza gbagbla tili bashogoћА k…Ыl…Ы k…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы bal…Ыibi, …Фm…Фs…Ы an…Ф nyia an…Ф eluћГ ebui…Ы g…Ы ba…Ц…Ф…Ф n…Ы y…ЫuluћГhuћГ m…Ы.

ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
text: K…Ыl…Ы n…Фm…ФћА p…Ы n…ФoluћГ kana g…Ы Paulo any…Ы al…Ы etsyina banun…Ф ekpe…Цekpe…Цe…Ы m…Ы, p…Ы agbana ban…ФkpekpeћА…Ы atsa…Цak…Ы idzo n…Ы Efoso…Ф n…ЫћА Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы petee tsy…Ы. A…Ц…Ф as…Ы ibudi…Ы g…Ы ban…Фdzyrame…Ы abh…Ыt…Ы tinu akaa nanaћА.

ref: You must tell everyone what you have seen and heard.
text: W…ФbodziћА an…Ф g…Ы …Фb…Ф…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф …Фdal…Ы y…Ыishu …Фk…Ф banun…Ф petee n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы …Фm…Ф p…Ы oluћГ…Ф shu.

ref: My friends, I want you to know that I have often planned to come for a visit. But something has always kept me from doing it. I want to win followers to Christ in Rome, as I have done in many other places.
text: M…Ыel…Ы al…Ы m…Ф, …Ыp…Ы s…Ы t…Ы k…ЫzaћГ tititiћА m…Ы k…Ф …Фn…Ф …Фs…Ы an…Ы obo m…Ыt…Ф…Ц…Ф w…Фn…Ф …Фk…Ф t…Ыbaba ibui flogo t…Ы m…Ыm…Ф …Ыdzo t…Ы m…Ыibu at…Фwui n…Ы …Фn…Ф m…Ы, as…Ы ibu g…Ы itibu at…Фwui teli g…Ы letinu Yudan…Ы n…Ы …Ыk…Ф tili ana.
